results.name: BiPC
results.subject: BiPC
results.question: A learner applies physiological regulation in a new problem from "Chemistry (1st Year)". What is the best first step?

incorrect_answers: Start from Chemistry (1st Year) and skip checking constraints.
Use Chemistry (1st Year) application as a shortcut and avoid interpretation.
Pick Chemistry (1st Year) inference by intuition and finalise without verification.
